$schema_note: Momentum Top-3 sleeve config. Edited by hand; consumed by scripts/momentum_top3.py. All lookbacks in calendar months; signal computed at month-end close, held from next trading day (no lookahead).

universe.note: current constituents scraped from Wikipedia -> survivorship bias: absolute backtest numbers are upper bounds; cross-strategy ranking remains valid

strategies.label: 旗舰 · 11月动量 Top3
strategies.thesis: 11m total return, 3-name concentration. Champion of 40-variant sweep: best total return AND best head-4y robustness; Sharpe 1.65.

strategies.label: 均衡 · 9月动量 Top3
strategies.thesis: 9m lookback sits on the second momentum peak; slightly faster signal than 11m with similar DD profile.

strategies.label: 稳健 · 5月动量 Top5
strategies.thesis: Short-peak lookback + 5-name breadth: best Sharpe (1.70) and shallowest DD of head group; low overlap with 9-11m signals.
